title: Making Differentiation Media for SH-SY5Y
author: Kenneth Schackart
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.xuufnww
materials: Aliquot 600 µL batches of 50x B-27 supplement.
Each aliquot will make 30 mL differentiation media.

steps.title: In a 15 mL centrifuge tube, add 14
steps.instruction: In a 15 mL centrifuge tube, add 14.25 mL ethanol and 0.75 mL autoclaved deionized water. This will make a 95% ethanol solution.

steps.title: Weigh out 5 mg ATRA
steps.instruction: Weigh out 5 mg ATRA. ATRA is light sensitive, so do this step with the lights off.

steps.title: Transfer 3330 µL of 95% EtOH...
steps.instruction: Transfer 3330 µL of 95% EtOH solution to another 15 mL centrifuge tube.

steps.title: Add the 5 mg ATRA to...
steps.instruction: Add the 5 mg ATRA to the 3330 µL 95% EtOH solution. This makes a 5 mM stock ATRA solution.

steps.title: This solution is used at a...
steps.instruction: This solution is used at a rate of 100 µL stock solution per 50 mL differentiation media. The final concentration should be 10 μM. We most recently made 10 aliquots, each with 62 µL . This is to make 10 30 mL media batches, each using 60 µL .

steps.title: Stock solution can be stored for...
steps.instruction: Stock solution can be stored for up to 6 weeks at 4 °C .

steps.title: Aliquot 15 mL NBM into a 15 mL centrifuge tube
steps.instruction: Aliquot 15 mL NBM into a 15 mL centrifuge tube.

steps.title: Add the l-glutamine to the NBM
steps.instruction: Add the l-glutamine to the NBM.

steps.title: Aliquot the solution into 1
steps.instruction: Aliquot the solution into 1.5 mL aliquots. This solution is 20x. The concentration is 80 mM and the final desired concentration is 4 mM. This protocol makes 10 aliquots of 1.5 mL . Each stock aliquot makes 30 mL differentiation medium.

steps.title: Do not mix the media until...
steps.instruction: Do not mix the media until you are ready to change the media in a flask. It degrades quickly. Warm 30 mL NBM in water bath.

steps.title: Thaw one 50x B-27 supplement aliquot,...
steps.instruction: Thaw one 50x B-27 supplement aliquot, and one 20x l-glutamine supplement.

steps.title: In biosafety cabinet, combine the following...
steps.instruction: In biosafety cabinet, combine the following in a 50 mL tube 29.34 mL Nuerobasal Medium 600 µL 50x B-27 Supplement 1.5 mL 20x l-glutamine Stock Solution 60 µL 500x All- trans- retinoic Acid Stock Solution
